issues.description: Missing passive ability: 'If you have 7 or more cards in your trash, this Character cannot be removed from the field by your opponent's effects.' This requires a Condition (TrashCount>=7) with an action preventing removal/KO by opponent effects.

SearchDeck action incomplete: must specify filter for {Five Elders} type card, limit to reveal 1, and handle remaining 4 cards returned to bottom of deck in any order. Current filter is 'Any' with no type constraint.

Action only adds card to hand but does not return remaining cards to bottom of deck. Need separate action or enhanced SearchDeck to handle: reveal up to 1 {Five Elders}, add to hand, place rest at bottom in any order.

actions.keyword: Cannot be removed from field by opponent effects

actions.description: Look at 5 cards from top of deck; reveal up to 1 {Five Elders} type card and add to hand. Place rest at bottom in any order.
